_doc: Curated problem->sector knowledge base for the AI Sector-Regime Analyst (Phase 2B S2). Owner-extensible. Each theme maps a structural or cyclical PROBLEM / shift to the Indian sectors it HELPS (up) or HURTS (down), with the observable drivers that signal it forming. The analyst uses this to GROUND its problem->solution->sector reasoning; it may also reason to NEW mappings not listed here (and should flag when it does). Sector names match config.py SECTOR_MAP: Banking, IT, Energy, Auto, FMCG, Pharma, Finance_NBFC, Metals, Cement, Telecom, Infrastructure, Consumer, Chemicals, Realty, Diversified, Paints, Media, Industrials.

themes.problem: India imports ~85% of crude; elevated crude + a weak rupee widen the import bill and fiscal/CAD pressure.
themes.example: 2022-24: E20 ethanol mandate + elevated crude re-rated sugar/ethanol (Consumer/Energy) names.

themes.problem: Global supply chains diversify away from China; India captures manufacturing, electronics and specialty-chemical share.
themes.example: 2023-25: electronics/contract-manufacturing + specialty chemicals re-rated on China+1.

themes.problem: Generative AI compresses demand for traditional Indian IT services (commoditised coding/BPO) while lifting data-centre / power demand.
themes.example: 2023-25: Indian IT services de-rated on AI-substitution fears + weak US discretionary spend.

themes.problem: RBI rate cuts lower funding cost and revive credit-sensitive demand (housing, autos, capex).
themes.example: Rate-cut cycles historically lift NBFCs/realty as funding cost + EMI fall.

themes.problem: War / border tension / energy-security shocks drive defence indigenisation and safe-haven flows.
themes.example: Conflict episodes lift defence-industrials, energy security and gold-linked names.

themes.problem: Large public capex (roads, rail, power, water) drives an infra + cement + capital-goods upcycle.
themes.example: Pre-election + Budget capex pushes lift infra/cement/cap-goods order books.

themes.problem: A good monsoon + rural income support revives mass FMCG and two-wheeler / entry-auto demand.
themes.example: Good-monsoon years revive rural FMCG volumes + two-wheeler sales.

themes.problem: Global metal/commodity price upcycles lift Indian producers' realisations; downcycles compress them.
themes.example: 2021 commodity supercycle drove a sharp metals re-rating.

themes.problem: US generics pricing, specialty/CDMO shift, and domestic healthcare demand drive pharma cycles.
themes.example: Pharma re-rates when US price erosion stabilises + CDMO/specialty momentum builds.

themes.problem: Affordability + low rates + inventory drawdown drive a multi-year residential realty upcycle that pulls cement, financiers, and building materials.
themes.example: Post-2021 housing upcycle lifted realty, cement, home-financiers and paints together.
